response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong staff-level generalist with deep TypeScript/Node experience, cloud exposure (AWS CDK), and directly relevant current work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure at Naver — a rare and valuable match for the role's key technologies. However, his hands-on GenAI experience spans roughly one year, far short of the 8+ years of AI-driven solution development required, and the resume shows no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or evaluation pipelines. His teaching and workshop background suggests customer-facing aptitude, but enterprise consulting and technical discovery leadership are unproven, making him a stretch for a forward-deployed staff role as specified.
strengths: Current hands-on experience building MCP servers/code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks — directly matches key technologies
15+ years of production engineering with staff-level seniority and strong TypeScript/Node.js and AWS depth
Proven mentorship and communication skills through workshops, courses, and conference talks — relevant to customer-facing discovery
concerns: Only ~1 year of GenAI/AI-agent work versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or AI evaluation/observability pipelines
No evidence of enterprise customer-facing consulting or leading technical discovery with external stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Falls far short of 8+ years AI-solutions requirement
No RAG, vector database, or Python evidence
